sentences.english: My mom asked me to clean my room today.
sentences.korean: 오늘 엄마가 방 청소를 하라고 하셨어요.

sentences.english: It was really messy with clothes on the floor and books on the bed.
sentences.korean: 바닥에 옷이 있고 침대에 책이 있어서 정말 지저분했어요.

sentences.english: I put my clothes in the closet and the books on the shelf.
sentences.korean: 옷을 옷장에 넣고 책을 선반에 놓았어요.

sentences.english: Then I vacuumed the floor and wiped the desk.
sentences.korean: 그러고 나서 바닥에 청소기를 돌리고 책상을 닦았어요.

sentences.english: Now my room looks great and I feel much better.
sentences.korean: 이제 방이 멋져 보이고 기분이 훨씬 좋아요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
